ques: Find information on ESPN about the top three scoring leaders in the NBA as of the last day of the regular season, and note which teams they play for.
answer: The top three NBA scoring leaders for the 2025-26 regular season were: 1) Luka Dončić, Los Angeles Lakers (28.8 PPG); 2) Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Oklahoma City Thunder (28.7 PPG); 3) Anthony Edwards, Minnesota Timberwolves (28.3 PPG).
